english: Lakshmi, dwelling on a lotus, Padma, lotus-faced, beloved of Padmanabha
roman: Lakshmih padmalaya Padma padmamukhi Padmanabha priya

hindi: पुण्डरीका वरारोहा शान्ता श्रीः श्रीमती सती।
english: Pundarika, beautiful, peaceful, Sri, Shrimati, Sati
roman: Pundarika vararo ha shanta Shrih Shrimati Sati

english: Vimala, world-mother, contentment, nourishment, fortitude, the auspicious
roman: Vimala Vishva janani tushtih pushti dhritih Shiva

english: Golden Mahalakshmi, Durga, earth-goddess, bearer of all
Mother of all worlds, mother of the universe, Mahavidya, Maheshwari
roman: Loka mata Vishva mata Mahavidya Maheshvari

english: Whoever reads the Lakshmi Sahasranama Stotram with devotion always
roman: Lakshmi sahasranama stotram yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: Attains inexhaustible wealth and prosperity by the power of Lakshmi's grace
roman: Akshayam dhana sampattim labhate Lakshmi kripa balat
